user.title: Connect to WeatherDataLogger
user.description: Enter the connection details for the weatherdatalogger MariaDB database. A read-only DB user is recommended — see sql/create_readonly_user.sql in the WeatherDatalogger-HA repo.

data_description.host: Hostname or IP address of the MariaDB server.
data_description.port: TCP port the MariaDB server listens on.
data_description.database: Name of the database containing the weatherdatalogger tables.
data_description.username: Database user used to read the weather data. A read-only account is recommended.
data_description.location: Matches the [visualcrossing] location setting in WeatherDatalogger — defaults to "home".

reconfigure.title: Update WeatherDataLogger connection
reconfigure.description: Update the connection details for the weatherdatalogger MariaDB database. Current values are pre-filled below.

data_description.host: Hostname or IP address of the MariaDB server.
data_description.port: TCP port the MariaDB server listens on.
data_description.database: Name of the database containing the weatherdatalogger tables.
data_description.username: Database user used to read the weather data. A read-only account is recommended.
data_description.location: Matches the [visualcrossing] location setting in WeatherDatalogger — defaults to "home".

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect — check host/port and that combined_realtime exists in the target database.

abort.reconfigure_successful: The connection settings were updated successfully.

init.title: WeatherDataLogger options
init.description: Adjust how often the database is polled for new readings.

data_description.scan_interval: How often (in seconds, 15-300) to poll the database for new readings.
